{'description': 'Master enum of all configuration keys. Each value has a primary numeric Id used as FK in ApplicationSettings.Id.', 'name': 'AppSetting', 'notable_keys': ['GatewayAPISingleToken(33)', 'BatchAccountName(101)', 'BatchAccountKey(102)', 'BatchAccountUrl(103)', 'BatchPoolName(104)', 'BatchAppCommandLine(105)', 'SendGridAPIKey(130)', 'SendGridHost(229)', 'InfobipApiKey(143)', 'InfobipBaseUrl(144)', 'InfobipSender(145)', 'RequestLogLevel(160)', 'DisableAllBroadcasts(184)', 'DisableAllSystemMessages(206)', 'QuickResponseRandomChars(210)', 'IsTestMode(25)', 'DefaultFromEmail(40)', 'DefaultFromName(41)', 'MaxSmsSendoutSize(50)', 'FtpServerPath(60)', 'DefaultSmsLanguage(80)', 'DefaultEmailLanguage(81)'], 'type': 'enum'}

{'description': 'New field: Customers.MonthToDeleteMessages (int NOT NULL DEFAULT 60). Controls how many months before messages are deleted by cleanup_messages batch job. Configurable per customer via admin UI. Default 60 months = 5 years.', 'name': 'MonthToDeleteMessages', 'source': 'devops:#12085,12086,12087', 'type': 'column on Customers', 'related': ['SmsGroups.DateMessagesDeletedUtc (datetime null) — set by cleanup_messages after deleting']}

{'description': 'Two deployment slots: production and staging. Cert renewal and other config changes staged on staging slot, then swapped. Environment variables WEBSITE_LOAD_CERTIFICATES and Saml2:CertificateThumbprint are per-slot config settings.', 'name': 'DeploymentSlots', 'rules': ['Config changes applied to staging, verified, then swapped to production', 'Post-swap: staging slot config must be updated again to prevent next swap from reverting'], 'source': 'wiki:Authentication/SSO.md', 'type': 'infrastructure'}

{'methods': ['Get(AppSetting setting, string defaultSetting) → string (cached)', 'GetUncached(AppSetting setting) → string', 'GetBool(AppSetting setting) → bool', 'GetList(AppSetting setting) → IList<string>', 'Save(AppSetting setting, string value)', 'CreateDefault() → creates missing AppSetting rows with default values'], 'name': 'IApplicationSettingService', 'cache_key': 'Sms.applicationsettings', 'description': 'Single entry point for ALL application configuration. Cache is invalidated on Save(). All credentials and feature flags accessed via this service.', 'type': 'interface'}

{'methods': ['GetAll() → IReadOnlyCollection<FileType>', 'GetFileTypeById(id) → FileType', 'FileTypeIdFromExtension(extension) → int?'], 'name': 'IFileTypeService', 'description': 'File type registry lookups. FileTypeIdFromExtension returns null if extension is not registered = upload rejected.', 'type': 'interface'}

{'name': 'AzureBlobStorageContainers', 'source': 'wiki:ServiceAlert/Infrastructure/Blob-storage.md', 'containers': [{'name': '$logs', 'purpose': 'App service logging (Application Logging feature in Azure)'}, {'name': 'app-servicealert-0723c9a7a4cc4a039c52458f72fe24c7', 'purpose': 'Azure Batch executable (batch app binary)'}, {'name': 'certificates', 'purpose': 'Certificates not in Azure Key Vault (e.g. Ejerfortegnelse)'}, {'name': 'importedfiles', 'purpose': 'DataImporter files without ProfileId or CustomerId'}, {'name': 'customerimports', 'purpose': 'DataImporter files with CustomerId only (no ProfileId)'}, {'name': 'profileimports', 'purpose': 'DataImporter files with both ProfileId and CustomerId'}, {'name': 'profileaddresscache', 'purpose': 'Cached profile addresses for broadcast page (production)'}, {'name': 'profileaddresscachedev', 'purpose': 'Cached profile addresses for broadcast page (dev/staging)'}, {'name': 'profilestorage', 'purpose': 'User-uploaded files per profile (profile storage feature)'}, {'name': 'errorlogs', 'purpose': 'Error logs: Dapper DB connection failures, Dapper license issues, SendGrid email error responses'}], 'type': 'infrastructure'}

{'name': 'AzureKeyVault', 'source': 'wiki:Authentication/SSO.md', 'type': 'infrastructure', 'purpose': 'Stores SAML2 certificate for SSO. Certificate thumbprint referenced via WEBSITE_LOAD_CERTIFICATES and Saml2:CertificateThumbprint app settings in Azure App Service.'}

{'table': 'ApplicationSettings', 'name': 'ApplicationSetting', 'description': 'Stores one row per AppSetting enum key. Value is serialized as string. DefaultValue auto-populated by CreateDefault(). DateLastUpdatedUtc set on Save().', 'columns': ['Id', 'Value', 'DefaultValue', 'DateLastUpdatedUtc']}

{'table': 'FileTypes', 'name': 'FileType', 'description': 'Registry of allowed file types in the system. Used by IProfileStorageService.FileTypeIdFromExtension() when validating uploads.', 'columns': ['Id', 'Extension', 'MimeType', 'DescriptionTranslationKey', 'IconName', 'IsImage']}

{'table': 'Icons', 'name': 'Icon', 'description': 'System icon registry. Icons used throughout UI for consistent iconography. Name matches IconName in FileTypes table.', 'columns': ['Id', 'Name', 'CssClass']}

{'table': 'IdentifierTypes', 'name': 'IdentifierType', 'description': 'Defines the types of owner identifiers per country (e.g. Norwegian org number, Danish CVR, Finnish y-number). Used in address/owner lookup flows.', 'columns': ['Id', 'Name', 'Description', 'CountryId']}
